class.name: JustAMCPToolExecutor
class.brief_description: Routes MCP tool calls to the matching JustAMCP tool implementation.

method.name: execute_tool
method.description: Executes the tool named by [param tool_name] with [param args] and returns the tool response dictionary. Unknown or unavailable tools return an error dictionary.

method.name: get_tool_schemas
method.description: Returns MCP JSON schema dictionaries for the available tools. Set [param register_only] to return registration metadata only, or [param ignore_settings] to bypass editor filtering.

method.name: set_test_scene_root
method.description: Overrides the scene root used by scene-related tools. This is intended for tests and headless validation that need a deterministic root [Node].
